case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A VS. NANCY E BEAUREGARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-17-2018 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAUREGARD, NANCY E AN INDIVIDUAL $27,793.00 PRINCIPAL, $580.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,373.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100050468)
